## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the new webinar campaign strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal Set:** Drive 200–300 registrations for the Nov 19 webinar, a realistic target given the 2.5-week timeline and past performance (1k registrants with heavy promotion vs. 400–500 with light effort).](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** Maximize volume by sending 1.5k–2k emails daily, targeting only Gmail accounts to bypass Outlook's AI spam filters and ensure high deliverability.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**New Lead Source:** Launch a Triggerify campaign in Clay to capture high-intent leads by monitoring LinkedIn for engagement on posts with keywords like "SERGIO" and "AI."](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Asset Centralization:** Consolidate all reusable Clay tables (e.g., AI Teams Enrichment) into a central Notion doc to create a shared "toolkit" and prevent redundant work.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Campaign Strategy

  - [**Goal:** 200–300 registrations for the Nov 19 webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Execution:** Maximize daily email volume (1.5k–2k) to hit the registration target.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [**Audience:** Broaden targeting beyond B2B SaaS to any notable company, as the webinar's topic ("AI for marketing") has wide appeal.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**List Building:**](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [**Filter:** Target companies with ≥$5M in funding.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This funding threshold is a proxy for Seed-stage companies, ensuring a focus on established but not enterprise-level businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [**Enrichment:** Use 10k–15k Clay credits to enrich funding data.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [**Deliverability:** Target only Gmail accounts to bypass Outlook's AI spam filters and maximize inbox placement.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### New Lead Source: Triggerify Campaign

  - [**Concept:** A new lead source to capture high-intent prospects by monitoring LinkedIn engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**Process (based on Alex's successful campaign):**](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
    1.  [**Monitor:** Triggerify scans LinkedIn for engagement on posts with keywords (e.g., "SERGIO," "AI").](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
    2.  [**Filter:** New leads are added to a Clay table and filtered against HubSpot to remove existing contacts.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
    3.  [**Enrich:** Find and validate email addresses and LinkedIn profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
    4.  [**Outreach:** Send a personalized email and LinkedIn message referencing the specific post engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
  - [**Execution:** Mark will launch this campaign ASAP using Clay credits.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)

### Asset Centralization

  - [**Problem:** Reusable Clay tables are not consistently documented, leading to redundant work.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a central Notion doc to serve as a "toolkit" for all shared assets.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [**Action:** Mark will document the "AI Teams Enrichment Table" in Notion, including its function and usage instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Ping Kyle for Mark's Clay access.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
      - [Build the webinar list using the new criteria (≥$5M funding, Gmail-only).](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [Launch the Triggerify campaign for the webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
      - [Document the "AI Teams Enrichment Table" in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/YtUtZuiBwuJRHKnx9FsrUYiW2ij6LLPq?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
